title: pomatocalpa maculosum subsp. maculosum
intro: Pomatocalpa maculosum subsp. maculosum, commonly known as the spotted Dendrobium, is a type of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It is traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing, as well as its ability to enhance immune function and reduce oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and is sometimes combined with other medicinal plants to create traditional remedies.
